result.finding: One primary external dependency: MySQL database. The application also uses H2 in-memory database for development/test scenarios. Caffeine is used for in-process caching (not an external service). No external caches, auth services, storage systems, or message queues are required.
evidence: No LDAP, OAuth, S3, Azure Blob, or message queue configuration found
No README.md found with additional dependency information
values: MySQL (external database, production) - host/port configurable via env vars
H2 in-memory database (embedded, dev/test only) - not a true external dependency
Azure MySQL integration supported via spring-cloud-azure-starter-jdbc-mysql
